# Heme vs Chlorin metal

## Short Teaching Summary
Heme vs Chlorin metal: Chlorins are similar to the heme of hemoglobin, but the core metal atom is magnesium (Mg) in chlorins and iron (Fe) in heme. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.

- Chlorins are similar to the heme of hemoglobin, but the core metal atom is magnesium (Mg) in chlorins and iron (Fe) in heme.
